{{Quote|Move over Y-wing!|Rebel Air Cruiser pilot|<ref name="Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''</ref>}}
The '''Light Corvette''' was a vessel utilized by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Characteristics==
The Light Corvette was also known generically as an "air cruiser". Its weaponry consisted of a single main cannon, most effective against landbased targets such as fortifications, [[Infantry/Legends|infantry]], and mechanized units.

{{Ship-stub}}
